pandoc 
  to: html
  output-file: index.html
  standalone: true
  title-prefix: Curso
  section-divs: true
  html-math-method: mathjax
  wrap: none
  default-image-extension: png
  toc: false
  variables: {}
  
metadata
  pagetitle: Curso
  document-css: false
  link-citations: true
  date-format: long
  lang: es
  csl: citas/chicago-author-date.csl
  bibliography:
    - citas/references.bib
  engines:
    - path: C:\Users\aimar\AppData\Local\Programs\Quarto\share\extension-subtrees\julia-engine\_extensions\julia-engine\julia-engine.js
  theme: styles.scss
  page-layout: full
  sidebar: false
  listing:
    - id: front
      contents: templates/front.yml
      template: templates/front.ejs
    - id: instructors
      contents: templates/instructors.yml
      template: templates/instructors.ejs
